details.test: Task 1: Select annual membership with indoor pistol and guest passes
Task 2: Book evening pistol lane with .22 LR ammo add-on
Task 3: Register for cheapest Basic Handgun Safety next month (weekend morning, >=3h)
Task 4: Register for 25 m pistol competition in June as intermediate under $60
Task 5: Add T-shirts to cart with rating filter and select Standard Shipping
Task 6: Make one-time $75 donation to Junior Development fund
Task 7: Add one pistol and one rifle weekday evening training session to My Schedule
Task 8: Add junior family member and enroll them in a Saturday morning course as family member
Task 9: Copy ear protection rule into member profile notes
